name: Chicken Burritos - Sort Of
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Cooked Chicken Meat, chopped or shredded
Shredded Cheddar and/or Monterey Jack Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and green peppers; cook until onions are translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (chicken, chilies, garlic, cumin, basil, chili powder, jalapenos, salt, pepper, tomato juice, water) to the skillet.
4. Stir and bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally until the liquid has mostly evaporated, achieving the desired consistency.
6. Spoon the filling onto warm tortillas.
7. Add shredded cheese (cheddar and/or Monterey Jack) and sour cream on top of the filling.
8. Roll up the tortilla tightly and enjoy.
